arts.ttl: Premier League intensity or caution - how will Tuchel's England play?
arts.sum: Before Thomas Tuchel's first game as England boss, BBC Sport tries to unpick - and predict - how his Three Lions side might play.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand shares instant reaction after Arsenal star Myles Lewis-Skelly scores on his England debut
arts.sum: Arsenal star and England debutant Myles Lewis-Skelly is enjoying an absolutely sensational season. The 18-year-old began the campaign as one of the best youngsters in...

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel's five-word verdict on Myles Lewis-Skelly says it all amid dream England debut
arts.sum: Arsenal star Myles Lewis-Skelly enjoyed the perfect start to his England career by scoring the first goal of the Thomas Tuchel era but it was something that the Three Lions boss saw coming

arts.ttl: Tuchel is true to his word by not singing the English anthem before his first England game
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel did not sing along to the English national anthem before his first game as coach of England on Friday. The German, whose appointment was greeted with outrage in some sections of the English media, said last week he had to “earn” the right to sing “God Save the King.”

arts.ttl: Man Utd DESPERATE to win race for 'next Declan Rice'
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly determined to fight off competition from Manchester City to land Crystal Palace midfielder Adam Wharton during the upcoming summer transfer window. The Manchester giants both view Wharton as a player with the potential to become “the next Declan Rice ”, as per TEAMtalk, although Palace could reportedly demand a transfer fee in excess of €80 million as they look to retain the Englishman’s services.

arts.ttl: England boss Thomas Tuchel's reason for not singing national anthem before first game
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel has been scrutinised over his claim that he will not sing the national anthem ahead of his first England match against Albania on Friday night - with the German insisting he must "earn the right"

arts.ttl: LIVE: England take on Albania in World Cup qualifying opener
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel starts his reign as England manager by handing out two new caps for Dan Burn and Myles Lewis-Skelly

arts.ttl: George Eastham: England celebrate life of World Cup winner before Albania game in first match since 1966 hero's death
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel will take charge of his first game since coming in for Gareth Southgate as England kick off their qualifying campaign at the Home of Football.

arts.ttl: Why Tuchel is the 'perfect fit' for England
arts.sum: BBC Sport pundit Thomas Hitzlsperger discusses the tactics of new England manager Thomas Tuchel before Friday's game against Albania.

arts.ttl: Lewis-Skelly, Burn handed debuts against Albania
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel has handed debuts to Myles Lewis-Skelly and Dan Burn in his first game as England boss, with Marcus Rashford also named in the starting lineup to face Albania.
